sentences.arabic: طَلَبَتْ دِيمَةُ مِنْ أُمِّهَا نُقُودًا لِشِرَاءِ طَعَامٍ فِي المَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Dima je tražila od majke novac za hranu u školi.
sentences.translationEn: Dima asked her mother for money to buy food at school.

sentences.translation: Majka joj je dala dovoljan iznos za obrok.
sentences.translationEn: The mother gave her enough money for the meal.

sentences.translation: Dima je kupila sendvič i sok.
sentences.translationEn: Dima bought a sandwich and juice.

sentences.arabic: بَقِيَ مَعَهَا بَعْضُ النُّقُودِ فَأَعَادَتْهَا لِأُمِّهَا.
sentences.translation: Ostalo joj je nešto novca pa ga je vratila majci.
sentences.translationEn: She had some money left so she returned it to her mother.

sentences.translation: Majka je pohvalila kćer zbog poštenja.
sentences.translationEn: The mother praised her daughter for her honesty.
